Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.Action

Packages that use Action
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource This package provides the base definitions for managing media processing resources. 
javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common Manage resources that can be inserted in different ResourceContainers like MediaGroups, NetworkConnections or MixerAdapters. 
 

Uses of Action in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that return types with arguments of type Action
 java.util.Set<Action> SupportedFeatures.getSupportedActions()
          Provide the Set of supported Actions.
 

Uses of Action in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup declared as Action
static Action Recorder.CANCEL
          Cancel the current recording operation.
static Action Player.JUMP_BACKWARD
          Jump backward by the amount specified by JUMP_TIME.
static Action Player.JUMP_BACKWARD_IN_PLAYLIST
          Jump backward the number of items indicated by JUMP_PLAYLIST_INCREMENT.
static Action Player.JUMP_FORWARD
          Jump forward by the amount specified by JUMP_TIME.
static Action Player.JUMP_FORWARD_IN_PLAYLIST
          Jump forward the number of play list items indicated by JUMP_PLAYLIST_INCREMENT.
static Action Player.JUMP_TO_PLAYLIST_END
          Jump to the last item in the play list.
static Action Player.JUMP_TO_PLAYLIST_ITEM_END
          Jump to the end of the curent play list item.
static Action Player.JUMP_TO_PLAYLIST_ITEM_START
          Jump to the start of the current play list item
static Action Player.JUMP_TO_PLAYLIST_START
          Jump to the first item in the play list.
static Action Player.NORMAL_SPEED
          Set speed to normal.
static Action Player.NORMAL_VOLUME
          Set volume to normal.
static Action Player.PAUSE
          Pause the current Play operation, maintaining the current position in the play list item and play list.
static Action Recorder.PAUSE
          Pause the current operation on a recorder, maintaining the current position in the Media Stream being recorded.
static Action SpeechDetectorConstants.PROMPT_DONE
          Advise the Speech Detector that the prompt is finished.
static Action Player.RESUME
          Resume the current Play operation if paused.
static Action Recorder.RESUME
          Resume the current operation on a recorder if paused
static Action Player.SPEED_DOWN
          Decrease speed
static Action Player.SPEED_UP
          Increase speed
static Action Player.STOP
          Stop the current Play operation.
static Action Recorder.STOP
          Stop the current recording operation.
static Action Player.STOP_ALL
          Stop the current Play operation and all pending play operations in queue.
static Action Player.TOGGLE_VOLUME
          Toggle volume between normal and previous adjusted value.
static Action Player.VOLUME_DOWN
          Decrease volume by value of parameter VOLUME_CHANGE.
static Action Player.VOLUME_UP
          Increase volume by value of parameter VOLUME_CHANGE.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup that return Action
 Action PlayerEvent.getChangeType()
          Return an Action that identifies the type of Speed or Volume adjustment.
 

Uses of Action in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals declared as Action
static Action SignalDetector.CANCEL
          RTC Action to cause the cancellation of the current receiveSignals operation.
static Action SignalDetector.FLUSH_BUFFER
          RTC Action to cause the buffer to be flushed.
static Action SignalDetector.STOP
          RTC Action to cause the current receiveSignals operation to stop.
 

Uses of Action in javax.media.mscontrol.resource
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.resource that return Action
 Action RTC.getAction()
          Return the Action that defines action for this RTC.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.resource with parameters of type Action
 void ResourceContainer.triggerAction(Action rtca)
          Triggers a RTC action, requested by the application.
 

Constructors in javax.media.mscontrol.resource with parameters of type Action
RTC(Trigger trigger, Action action)
          Create an RTC object linking the Trigger condition to the Action command.
 

Uses of Action in javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.resource.common declared as Action
static Action VolumeConstants.NORMAL_VOLUME
          Set volume to normal.
static Action VolumeConstants.TOGGLE_VOLUME
          Toggle volume between normal and previous adjusted value.
static Action VolumeConstants.VOLUME_DOWN
          Decrease volume by value of parameter VOLUME_CHANGE.
static Action VolumeConstants.VOLUME_UP
          Increase volume by value of parameter VOLUME_CHANGE.
